channel.title: Openwrt on veldi
channel.description: Recent content in Openwrt on veldi

item.title: Let's build a fort: Homelab v1.0
item.description: This article goes into some of the whys and hows of my foundational setup of a secure home network and homelab. It goes into the hardware choices and the configuration of OpenBSD for the router and OpenWRT for a wireless access point.
